author: Dumitru Racovita

about.heading: Our Story
about.paragraph1: Coffee Varka was born from a simple idea — that great coffee deserves a great atmosphere. Since 2020, we've been roasting our own beans, perfecting our recipes, and creating a space where everyone feels at home.
about.paragraph2: Every cup we serve is crafted with care, using ethically sourced beans from small farms around the world. Whether you're here for a quick espresso or a long afternoon with a book, we're glad you stopped by.
